overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk street food stall at night, moving from the neon-lit entrance past customers, through the active kitchen with a working chef, and toward a back exit leading to a dark urban street. The footage is from a video game engine with high-fidelity graphics and neon-drenched atmospheric lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a cyberpunk street food stall with neon-lit digital menu boards overhead. The camera moves forward past customers waiting at the wooden counter with distinctive green stools, approaching the service area while the 'Happy Hour' sign glows on the right wall.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves behind the counter into the kitchen area, revealing a large cooking pot, industrial shelving, and a red Maelstrom gang banner on the back wall. A chef works at an active cooking station as steam rises from the grill, and the front counter recedes into the background.

agents.ego_description: moving past the chef and through the kitchen prep area toward the back of the stall

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the kitchen, the camera passes prep tables with stacked supplies on the right and approaches a back counter with condiment dispensers. The cooking station and chef move to the left background while the 'Happy Hour' sign becomes visible again on the far right wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: back exit corridor with glass door to dark street

events.description: approaching the glass exit door and looking out into the dark neon-lit street

agents.ego_description: moving toward the exit door and looking out into the night street beyond

dark urban alley visible through the exit door

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a narrow back corridor where the 'Happy Hour' sign appears on the left wall next to a 'Cartesian Duelists' poster. The camera approaches a glass exit door revealing a dark cyberpunk street with distant neon lights glowing in the night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the vibrant, neon-lit front of a cyberpunk food stall through its industrial kitchen and into a dark urban alley. It begins by gliding past customers seated on green stools beneath glowing digital menus, moving toward the service area as a Happy Hour sign illuminates the right wall. As the camera crosses behind the counter, the scene shifts into a steaming kitchen featuring a working chef, industrial shelving, and a red Maelstrom gang banner. The perspective then pushes deeper past prep tables and condiment dispensers, leaving the cooking station behind as the environment narrows. Finally, the camera moves through a tight back corridor past a Cartesian Duelists poster before reaching a glass exit door that opens onto a dark street punctuated by distant neon lights.
